subject: Called your office today — noticed something
body:
Hi,

I called your office earlier today and noticed your missed-call auto-response fired immediately — that tells me you already have some automation in place.

I do free audits for dental clinics to identify gaps in the full patient communication sequence. Most clinics with auto-text still have gaps in reactivation and reminder sequences.

Worth a quick look at Dental Works 4 Kids?

Mohamed
ClinicFlow Automation
438-544-0442
notes: SMS auto-response received after calling +1-905-450-5333. Clinic already has missed-call automation — prime prospect for reactivation/reminder upsell.
